project_discovery.project_type: Python CTCP goal-to-MVP project generator with CMake headless support
project_discovery.runtime: Python 3; optional CMake headless build; no package.json/pyproject project script file at repo root
project_discovery.readme_usage_summary: README names scripts/ctcp_orchestrate.py as runtime orchestrator and scripts/verify_repo.ps1 or scripts/verify_repo.sh as acceptance entrypoints.
project_discovery.entrypoint_change_reason: resolve_workflow outputs CTCP project workflow docs, not agent manifest
